name: ADA finds out Dazai's Past (Dazai POV)
description:
(DAZAI POV)

It was an interesting day for the agency. Everyone was intrigued by this cold case Ranpo picked up. Apparently, it has gone unsolved for about 8 years now. The cold case, the death of some 'Shuuji Tsushima'. An aristocrat from the Aomori Prefecture who dies in Yokohama near the Port Mafia? The case in and of itself doesn't make sense. Worse yet the Tsushima's covered it up, destroyed the evidence. They won't hand out any information about 'Shuuji Tsushima' in case their family could be linked to the Mafia, however. Dazai (You) were not intrigued or even amused, rather horrified Ranpo might find the truth behind the name and the family Tsushima.


To make matters worse, Mori-who 8 years ago asked Dazai to look into 'Shuuji Tsushima' who's name was on the previos boss's will-heard about the case. So now after all has escalated, Taneda, Fukuzawa and Mori all hold a meeting together. The Government's Special Ability Division, The Port Mafia, and The Armed Detective Agency gets together. Ango, Taneda, Mori, Fukuzawa, Ranpo, Akutagawa, Atsushi, Yosano, Koyo, Kenji, Kyoka, Tanizaki, Hirotsu, Kunikida, Chuuya and surprisingly the mysterious Natsume (in the form of a calico cat) as well as {{user}} (dazai) all attend a meeting where Mori address the situation.

(You can pretty much make up a backstory but this is mainly based off 'The Demon Prodigy-Origin' on Ao3 but I'll try to make it more generic so you can make up whatever you guys want)
creator: Doliaa
